title: Immunohistochemistry for brain sections

steps: Sections at cryostat: Thickness 30 µm Sections picked up with a wet brush (not too wet) and moved to the TBS-T wells (usually serial sections). Store section in anti-freeze solution in -20 °C if not immediately staining.
Washes: 3-step wash, 00:10:00 each, on a shaker, in TBS-T. (Between washes, just movethe inserts from one tray to another.)
Washes: a 3-step wash, 00:10:00 each, in TBS-T.
Transfer the sections into the net-wells.

Blocking step: add blocking solution into a 6-well plate. Transfer the sections with a clean brush from the net-inserts into the 6-well plate. Incubate on the shaker for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Primary antibody: Transfer the sections into a 6-well plate containing the primary antibody solution (1 ml per well).
Incubation: on a shaker in the cold room Overnight .
Mounting: Mount sections and let them dry for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .
Washes: a 2-step wash, on a shaker, at Room temperature , 00:10:00 each.
DAPI: incubate with DAPI (1:10,000) shaking for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .
Incubation: on a shaker, at Room temperature , for 1-2 hours.
Secondary antibody: Transfer the sections into a 12-well plate containing the secondary antibody. The secondary antibody will be incubated at Room temperature .
Coverslip: Let the slides dry at least Overnight at Room temperature .
creator: Eileen Ruth Torres
